creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

perl5.15 fails to install: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.8-exp-perl.20120521162438.pointyhat-west/perl-5.15.8.log 

fwiw, I also used the following 2 patches in testing: 

Index: bsd.perl.mk 
=================================================================== 
RCS file: /home/FreeBSD/pcvs/ports/Mk/bsd.perl.mk,v 
retrieving revision 1.24 
diff -u -r1.24 bsd.perl.mk 
--- Mk/bsd.perl.mk	11 Mar 2012 05:22:01 -0000	1.24 
+++ Mk/bsd.perl.mk	20 May 2012 05:31:57 -0000 
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ 
# PERL_ARCH		- Directory name of architecture dependent libraries 
#				  (value: mach). 
# PERL_PORT		- Name of the perl port that is installed 
-#				  (value: perl5.8) 
+#				  (default value: perl5.15) 
# SITE_PERL		- Directory name where site specific perl packages go. 
#				  This value is added to PLIST_SUB. 
# USE_PERL5		- If set, this port uses perl5 in one or more of the extract, 
@@ -44,7 +44,9 @@ 
Perl_Pre_Include=			bsd.perl.mk 
PERL_Include_MAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org 

-PERL_VERSION?=	5.12.4 
+# XXX MCL for ports/165594 
+# PERL_VERSION?=	5.12.4 
+PERL_VERSION?=	5.15.8 

.if !defined(PERL_LEVEL) && defined(PERL_VERSION) 
perl_major=		${PERL_VERSION:C|^([1-9]+).*|1|} 
@@ -66,7 +68,11 @@ 

# there must always be a default to prevent dependency failures such 
# as "ports/lang: not found" 
-.if    ${PERL_LEVEL} >= 501400 
+# XXX MCL for ports/165594 
+#.if    ${PERL_LEVEL} >= 501400 
+.if    ${PERL_LEVEL} >= 501500 
+PERL_PORT?=	perl5.15 
+.elif  ${PERL_LEVEL} >= 501400 
PERL_PORT?=	perl5.14 
.elif  ${PERL_LEVEL} >= 501200 
PERL_PORT?=	perl5.12 
@@ -118,7 +124,9 @@ 

.if ${want_perl_sign} == "+" 
.if ${USE_PERL5_LEVEL} > ${masked_PERL_LEVEL} 
-USE_PERL5_REASON?=	requires Perl ${want_perl_ver} or later, install lang/perl5.8, lang/perl5.10, lang/perl5.12 or lang/perl5.14 and try again 
+# XXX MCL for ports/165594 
+#USE_PERL5_REASON?=	requires Perl ${want_perl_ver} or later, install lang/perl5.8, lang/perl5.10, lang/perl5.12 or lang/perl5.14 and try again 
+USE_PERL5_REASON?=	requires Perl ${want_perl_ver} or later, install lang/perl5.8, lang/perl5.10, lang/perl5.12, lang/perl5.14 or lang/perl5.15 and try again 
IGNORE=	${USE_PERL5_REASON} 
.endif # ${USE_PERL5_LEVEL} > ${masked_PERL_LEVEL} 
.elif ${want_perl_sign} == "" 
Index: Makefile 
=================================================================== 
RCS file: /home/FreeBSD/pcvs/ports/lang/Makefile,v 
retrieving revision 1.770 
diff -u -r1.770 Makefile 
--- lang/Makefile	17 Mar 2012 11:22:17 -0000	1.770 
+++ lang/Makefile	21 May 2012 22:54:38 -0000 
@@ -239,6 +239,7 @@ 
SUBDIR += perl5.10 
SUBDIR += perl5.12 
SUBDIR += perl5.14 
+    SUBDIR += perl5.15 
SUBDIR += perl5.8 
SUBDIR += petite-chez 
SUBDIR += pfe
